zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith Lukyn於1570年出生在英國貝德福爾奧德爾時，她的父親William lukyn41歲，母親Thomasin Walter36歲。她於1585年1月與Johannes Edward Ward在英國素福爾可蕾托 福拉廷結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1626年3月22日之後在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Judith Lukyn于1570年出生在英国貝德福爾奧德爾时，她的父亲William lukyn41岁，母亲Thomasin Walter36岁。她于1585年1月与Johannes Edward Ward在英国素福爾可蕾托 福拉廷结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1626年3月22日之后在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Lukyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German (Lüken): see Lueken . This surname is also found in the Netherlands.

variants.name: Lueken
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Alois, Behrend, Eckhart, Othmar.
North German (Lüken): patronymic from Lüke, see Lueke . The surname Lüken is also found in the Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Judith Lukyn was born in 1570, in Odell, Bedfordshire, England, her father, William lukyn, was 41 and her mother, Thomasin Walter, was 36. She married Johannes Edward Ward in January 1585, in Little Wratting, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died after 22 March 1626, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith Lukyn est née en 1570, à Odell, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William lukyn, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Thomasin Walter, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Johannes Edward Ward en janvier 1585, à Little Wratting, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée après 22 mars 1626, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judith Lukyn 1570 in Odell, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William lukyn 41 und ihre Mutter Thomasin Walter 36. Sie hat im Januar 1585 in Little Wratting, Suffolk, England Johannes Edward Ward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb nach 22. März 1626 in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judith Lukyn è nata il nel 1570 nel Odell, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, William lukyn, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Thomasin Walter, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Johannes Edward Ward nel gennaio 1585, nel Little Wratting, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì dopo il 22 marzo 1626, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Judith Lukynが1570年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアオデルで生まれた時，父William lukynは41歳，母Thomasin Walterは36歳であった。1585年1月にイギリススフォルクリットル ウラッティングでJohannes Edward Wardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1626年3月22日以後にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Judith Lukyn(이)가 1570년 영국 베드퍼드실르 오데에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William lukyn(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thomasin Walter(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1585년 1월 영국 수폴크 리틀 래틴그에서 Johannes Edward Ward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1626년 3월 22일 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judith Lukyn nasceu em 1570, em Odell, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William lukyn, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Thomasin Walter, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Johannes Edward Ward em janeiro de 1585, em Little Wratting, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu após 22 de março de 1626, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith Lukyn родилась в 1570 г. в местности оделл, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William lukyn было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Thomasin Walter, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johannes Edward Ward январь 1585 г. в местности литл раттинг, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла после 22 марта 1626 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Johannes Edward Ward en enero de 1585, en Little Wratting, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió después de 22 de marzo de 1626, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
